policies: Refunds are available for charges made in the last 14 days.
Subscription downgrades can be applied at the next billing cycle.
Invoices can be re-sent from the billing portal.
actions: Confirm the billing issue and review the invoice.
Offer a refund or billing adjustment if policy allows.

policies: Account access issues should be verified with the latest email confirmation.
High-priority incidents should be escalated if the issue blocks access for more than 30 minutes.
actions: Guide the customer through a password reset or account recovery step.
Escalate to engineering if the issue persists after basic troubleshooting.

policies: Customers can update profile details from the account settings page.
Suspicious account activity should be reviewed immediately.
actions: Verify identity before changing account information.
Review recent activity for signs of suspicious access.

policies: Plan changes take effect at the next billing cycle unless otherwise stated.
Enterprise plan features require admin approval.
actions: Explain the current plan and available upgrade paths.
Share the renewal timeline and billing impact.
